last_checkpoint.summary: Accepted after FAIL->fix cycle: 3 lifecycle tests promoted with runtime binary resolution (incl. CI triple dirs), panic-safe teardown, latent test bugs fixed. REQUIRE_BINARY workflow export handed to F17.

W0.summary: W0 wave complete: baseline revalidated (W0.1), source census accepted with graph amendments D008 (W0.2), plan quarantined/cleared and projections verified (W0.3).

W1.summary: W1 synthesis: all 10 children accepted (F01-F08, R01, R03); runtime ownership and persistence closed; integrated gate green over 3 rounds with zero residue.

W2.summary: W2 synthesis: all 7 children accepted (R04, F09-F14). Recovery reconciliation and global resource bounds closed; lifecycle matrix green over 2 rounds.

W0.1.summary: Baseline revalidated: railway OK, protected hash intact, one worktree, stashes/refs preserved. Drift 1 (railway commits atop seed) benign. Drift 2 (stale selfdev pending_activation from dead session peacock, canary 923c6353e-dirty active as current/shared-server) preserved as F09 fixture per D006.

W0.2.summary: Source census: 25/25 files and 11/11 dirs exist; no wholly stale seam; all F-nodes retained. Amendments proposed: GN-1 fix F06 stale glob (mcp-serve at src/cli/mcp_serve.rs), GN-2 add jcode-selfdev-types to F09, GN-5 add explicit F04 surfaced-failure gate; scope guards GN-3 (reuse OwnedChildPermit), GN-4 (startup sweep pre-exists). Spot-checked by coordinator: background.rs:133 non-atomic swallow, mobile_server.rs CWD-first, release.yml:436 StrictHostKeyChecking=no, telemetry_state.rs uncompiled, zero *mcp* matches under src/cli/commands.

W0.3.summary: Stale historical swarm plan (94 nodes) snapshotted and cleared; stray resurrected workers stopped and one diff stashed (D007). Ownership/dependency projection validated: next runnable is W1/F01; F02-F04 background.rs overlap serialized by dependency chain.

F01.summary: F01 accepted at design revision 4 (a70db3700). Independent gate PASS at review round 3 (1a37ba109, gpt-5.6-sol high). Three FAIL rounds resolved: crate seam, coordinator protocol, turn boundary, quiescence epoch, watchdog handoff, termination ownership.

F02.summary: F02 accepted at 2b5607882 after 3-round independent review (PASS round 3). Both gates met: atomic idle claim over unified lease table; all exit modes through the bounded coordinator. Fixture transcript regenerated from exact-commit build, 3/3 passes.

F03.summary: F03 accepted: independent review PASS at d8c223d29 (both gates met). 23 in-process coordinator fixtures + 41/41 runtime matrix (strengthened post-review per F03-I1/I2). Found+fixed watch-send lost-publication bug.

F04.summary: F04 accepted at 9c4c99897 after 3-round review (PASS round 3). TaskStatusStore: atomic, serialized, terminal-precedent, failure-surfacing; fail-closed spawn prerequisite; cancel tombstones; explicit finalize data-loss policy. 10-item F05 handoff recorded.

F05.summary: F05 accepted at 9f4d34d11. Sol-high implementation via task DAG; Opus 4.8 first-round PASS (0 blockers). fsync durability, stale-temp sweep, collision policy, full verification matrix. 1186/1186 green.

F06.summary: F06 accepted at 84dc0aa2b. Sol-high implementation; Opus 4.8 first-round PASS (0 blockers), both gates reproduced with real-process tests. PID-reuse follow-ups noted for F07/F08.

F07.summary: Accepted after FAIL->fix->PASS cycle: detection+eviction (5c9ac8b42), reconnect+cooldown (d3fcba412), blocker fixes (58a806401). Re-review PASS with 5 minor findings recorded.

F08.summary: Accepted: integrated gate PASS verified by independent review; gate hardened per review findings (hung-server pgrep, socket FAIL enforcement).

F09.summary: Accepted after first-round PASS. 3 important follow-ups recorded: manifest lock for cross-process races, tri-state liveness, binary-content identity check.

F10.summary: Accepted: durable cleanup records + reason-aware startup reconcile + bounded deferred retry. Review PASS with findings 1-2 fixed in-cycle; finding 3 (tri-state liveness) shared follow-up with F09. server:: 490 green x3.

F11.summary: Verify PASS: 18-cell combined recovery matrix, 17 covered (12 tests + 4 independent probes), no false rollback, no fabricated terminal state. 1 uncovered cell code-inspected safe.

F12.summary: Accepted after FAIL->FAIL->PASS cycle: slot-reserving race-safe caps for pooled MCP children and background tasks, env-configurable, explicit refusals at manager and tool layers, capacity release verified.

F13.summary: Verify PASS: 16-way concurrent burst at cap admits exactly cap, zero leaked reservations across 50 cancelled setups, 10x looped probe identical; restart double-count impossible (in-memory-only counts + orphan sweep verified).

F14.summary: Accepted: rerunnable no-provider lifecycle matrix, 2 clean rounds (18/18 steps), verified by independent review. Follow-ups: network-denied demonstration, live exec-handoff reload in matrix.

F15.summary: Accepted: 58 ignores classified (0 unclassified), CI rails mapped, flakiness root-cause table, promotion shortlist for F16. Review PASS with full recount reconciliation.

F16.summary: Accepted after FAIL->fix cycle: 3 lifecycle tests promoted with runtime binary resolution (incl. CI triple dirs), panic-safe teardown, latent test bugs fixed. REQUIRE_BINARY workflow export handed to F17.

R01.summary: Accepted after FAIL->fix->re-review. Atomic publish, explicit reload target resolution, force threaded through ReloadSignal (BLOCKING-1 fix 923bba4aa), alias binding + 7-day GC. Reviews: hog (Opus 4.8, FAIL), dragon (Opus 4.8, PASS).

R03.summary: Accepted first round. Terminal-mode ownership: guard armed through exec, InheritedTerminalGuard, full signal-path disables. Review: dromedary (Opus 4.8, PASS) with 4 non-blocking hardening notes.

R04.summary: Accepted after first-round PASS by independent opus review (3b4680277). 4 non-blocking follow-ups recorded in the review: beacon multi-server keying, hard-crash semantics wording, Handoff watchdog arm, doctor wiring.
